name: manage_indexes
description: Create, list, update, or delete Meilisearch indexes. Each index is an independent collection of documents with its own settings, primary key, and search configuration. Use this to set up new data collections or manage existing ones.

parameters.name: uid
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the index. Must contain only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores.

parameters.name: primaryKey
parameters.description: The attribute that serves as the unique document identifier within this index.
